cookies.name: __Host-fcr_session
cookies.purpose: Maintain the allowlisted founder's Supabase Auth browser session on HTTPS production and preview hosts.
cookies.csrf: Exact FOUNDER_API_URL origin and same-origin Fetch Metadata are required for browser mutations; explicit Bearer clients are not cookie-authenticated.
cookies.deletion: Cleared by POST /auth/logout and by failed or disallowed session verification.

cookies.name: fcr_session
cookies.purpose: Provide the localhost-only development equivalent where a Secure cookie cannot be set over plain HTTP.
cookies.csrf: Exact localhost FOUNDER_API_URL origin and same-origin Fetch Metadata are required for browser mutations.
cookies.deletion: Cleared together with the production cookie name so environment transitions cannot leave an old session behind.

prohibited: analytics, advertising, fingerprinting, replay, or cross-site tracking cookies
caching any response that writes or refreshes the founder session
cookies that authorize merge, deployment, migration, spending, or external communication
